random.cdisc.data 0.3.13.9008
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Rebuilding Random CDISC Cached Data
  • Changelog

Reference

CDISC Domain Functions

These functions generate CDISC domains containing randomly assigned data

radae()

Adverse Event Analysis Dataset (ADAE)

radab()

ADA dataset

radaette()

Time to Adverse Event Analysis Dataset (ADAETTE)

radcm()

Concomitant Medication Analysis Dataset (ADCM)

raddv()

Protocol Deviations Analysis Dataset (ADDV)

radeg()

ECG Analysis Dataset (ADEG)

radex()

Exposure Analysis Dataset (ADEX)

radhy()

Hys Law Analysis Dataset (ADHY)

radlb()

Laboratory Data Analysis Dataset (ADLB)

radmh()

Medical History Analysis Dataset (ADMH)

radpc()

PK dataset

radpp()

PK parameters dataset

radqs()

Questionnaires Analysis Dataset (ADQS)

radrs()

Tumor Response Analysis Data Set (ADRS)

radsaftte()

Time to Safety Event Analysis Dataset (ADSAFTTE)

radsl()

Subject-Level Analysis Dataset (ADSL)

radsub()

Subcategory Analysis Dataset (ADSUB)

radtr()

Tumor Response Analysis Dataset (ADTR)

radtte()

Time-to-Event Analysis Dataset (ATE)

radvs()

Vital Signs Analysis Dataset (ADVS)

Cached Datasets

These datasets are attached in order speed up the example sections of the dependent packages. Note you can also use the cached option in thre respection r* function to retrieve these cached datasets.

cadae

Cached ADAE

cadab

Cached ADAB

cadaette

Cached ADAETTE

cadcm

Cached ADCM

caddv

Cached ADDV

cadeg

Cached ADEG

cadex

Cached ADEX

cadhy

Cached ADHY

cadlb

Cached ADLB

cadmh

Cached ADMH

cadpc

Cached ADPC

cadpp

Cached ADPP

cadqs

Cached ADQS

cadrs

Cached ADRS

cadsl

Cached ADSL

cadsub

Cached ADSUB

cadtr

Cached ADTR

cadtte

Cached ADTTE

cadvs

Cached ADVS

Utility Functions

These functions are not exported but are documented for developers

apply_metadata()

Metadata

h_anthropometrics_by_sex()

Generate anthropometric measurements for males and females.

mutate_na()

NA: replace values

rel_var()

Related variables: assign

relvar_init()

Related variables: initialize

replace_na()

Replace values in a vector by NA

retain()

Primary keys: retain values

rtexp()

Truncated Exponential Distribution

rtpois()

Zero-truncated Poisson Distribution

sample_fct()

Create a factor with random elements of x

var_relabel()

Primary keys: labels

visit_schedule()

Create visit schedule

Package Build Related

These files facilitate package build

random.cdisc.data

Create Random SDTM and ADAM Datasets

Contents

Developed by Pawel Rucki, Nick Paszty, Jana Stoilova, Joe Zhu, Christopher DiPietrantonio, Adrian Waddell, F. Hoffmann-La Roche AG.
